critical_issues.description: After filling customer login form (First Name + Last Name), the login modal does not close and checkout modal does not appear. This blocks the entire order flow.
critical_issues.root_cause: Customer authentication context may not be properly handling login/register flow, or there's an issue with the onSuccess callback
critical_issues.recommendation: Debug CustomerAuthContext login/register methods and verify the authentication flow completes successfully

critical_issues.description: Due to the login flow issue, the Place Order button in the checkout modal cannot be tested. Even if checkout modal appears, button visibility on mobile viewport (375x667) needs verification.
critical_issues.recommendation: Fix customer login flow first, then re-test Place Order button visibility on both desktop and mobile viewports

working_features: Cart UI layout (Your Cart on LEFT, Create Order in CENTER)
Cart count and total price display
Admin orders page access and layout
Notification sound upload section in settings
recommendations: PRIORITY 1: Fix customer login/register flow in CustomerAuthContext
PRIORITY 2: Verify checkout modal appears after successful customer login
PRIORITY 3: Test Place Order button visibility on mobile viewport after login fix
PRIORITY 4: Add test orders to verify admin orders panel displays orders correctly
PRIORITY 5: Test WhatsApp redirect functionality after order submission (currently blocked by login issue)
